description: The capability surface, as a single declarative source of truth: the door catalog, the room table, the auto-granted doors, and the storage single-writer map. Both the TypeScript implementation (claude-box.ts knownDoors / launcherd.ts ROOMS) and the Rust implementation (launcherd-rs doors.rs / rooms.rs) are validated against THIS file, so the two can never drift. Invariants I1-I5 are stated in contract/INVARIANTS.md and enforced by the validators in tests/contract.test.ts (TS) and the parity tests in launcherd-rs (Rust).

stores.note: The beads work-unit store. Exactly ONE writer (the dolt.container Quadlet unit). beadsd reaches it read/write over dolt's netns but is not a second SQL server on the volume. Nothing else may bind prx-dolt-data writable (I5) — in particular the retired prx-pod dolt must never start a competing server.
